title: Lock v0.3 product packaging plan
reason: Update ni's own locked planning contract to reflect the v0.3 product packaging direction across README pamphlet, visual identity, distribution, and model workspace pack surfaces.
proposed_changes: Record README as a product pamphlet with technical depth moved to docs and harness-neutral hero language.
Accept SVG-first visual identity with optional generated social image assets.
Require factual distribution language: release binaries for non-Go users before curl or package-manager availability claims.
Define Codex- and Claude-style model workspace packs as planning UX and no-terminal mode as assisted unless exact CLI proof is supplied.
risk_impact: Adds RISK-013 to prevent v0.3 packaging, distribution, model pack, and no-terminal copy from outrunning implemented proof or drifting into runtime-adapter claims.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because CAP-017 has linked requirement, evaluation, high-severity risk mitigation, artifacts, non-goals, and no blocker questions.
